title: Logic Circuit Sandbox
description: Drag-and-drop logic gates onto a grid canvas, wire them together, and watch signal propagation compute live.
concept: A full logic circuit simulator in your browser. Place 9 gate types (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, plus special INPUT, CLOCK, and OUTPUT nodes), draw bezier wires between ports, and see the circuit evaluate in real time using fixed-point iteration — meaning even feedback loops like SR latches converge correctly. Five preset circuits let you jump straight into a half adder, full adder, SR latch, 2-to-1 multiplexer, or majority voter.
features: 9 logic gate types: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, INPUT, OUTPUT
CLOCK gate auto-ticks at 500ms for dynamic circuits
Fixed-point simulation — handles feedback loops (SR latch) correctly
Infinite canvas with zoom (scroll) and pan (drag empty space)
5 preset circuits: Half Adder, Full Adder, SR Latch, 2-to-1 MUX, Majority Voter
Export current circuit as PNG download

interaction.mouse: Drag gates to move, drag on empty canvas to pan, scroll to zoom
interaction.click: Select gate button then click canvas to place; click output port then input port to wire; click INPUT gate to toggle 0/1
interaction.touch: Touch drag to move gates and pan; pinch to zoom
interaction.keyboard: Delete/Backspace removes selected gate; Escape cancels placing/wiring
